page_subtitle: All your AI projects in one place.
empty_body: Create your first project to start orchestrating a Claude / Codex / Gemini terminal with a dedicated brief.

create_dialog.title: New project
create_dialog.name_hint: Letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only.
create_dialog.brief_placeholder: Describe what the AI should do in this project…
create_dialog.provider_hint: The AI CLI will start with the active provider. You can change it later.

archive_dialog.title: Archive this project?
archive_dialog.body: The project moves to the archive. You can restore it any time. The files stay on disk.

delete_dialog.title: Delete this project for good?
delete_dialog.body: This action can't be undone. Metadata, tasks, and logs will be removed.

terminal.spawn_failed: Couldn't start the terminal. Make sure the {{cli}} CLI is installed.

errors.name_taken: A project with this name already exists.
